description: Query Scuba datasets directly. Get table schemas and run SQL queries for data analysis and debugging.

args: FBSOURCE=${FBSOURCE_ROOT:-$([ -d /data/sandcastle/boxes/fbsource ] && echo /data/sandcastle/boxes/fbsource || echo /data/users/$USER/fbsource)}; if [ "${SCUBA_MCP_DEV}" = "1" ]; then cd "$FBSOURCE" && exec buck2 run fbcode//model_context_protocol/python_servers/scuba:scuba_mcp_server; fi; BIN=$FBSOURCE/tools/devmate/python_servers_dotslash/scuba_mcp_server; if [ -f "$BIN" ]; then exec "$BIN"; else cd "$FBSOURCE" && exec buck2 run fbcode//model_context_protocol/python_servers/scuba:scuba_mcp_server; fi
